title: Alaska regulators reject permit application for controversial gold project
summary: Yereth Rosen Alaska Beacon Alaska regulators have rejected a permit application for a controversial gold-dredging project near Nome after determining that the plan is riddled with deficiencies and would put the public interest at risk. The Department of Natural Resources’ Division of Mining, Land and Water on Tuesday denied the application from Nevada-based IPOP LLC for a land-use permit and rejected the company’s plan for reclamation.
